  • Uses of DependencyGraph.Edge in org.key_project.slicing.graph

    Methods in org.key_project.slicing.graph that return types with arguments of type DependencyGraph.Edge
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    Stream<DependencyGraph.Edge>
    DependencyGraph.incomingGraphEdgesOf(GraphNode node)
    Returns the incoming edges of the given node.
    Stream<DependencyGraph.Edge>
    DependencyGraph.outgoingGraphEdgesOf(GraphNode node)
    Returns the outgoing edges of the given node.
